This pull request refactors the scoring logic by introducing a score_type attribute to consolidate how different scoring mechanisms are handled. Previously, boolean flags like is_cross_encoder and is_late_interaction were used. The new score_type can be bi-encoder, cross-encoder, or late-int

read_file() in run_batch.py did not check the HTTP response status when fetching batch input from a URL.
On non-200 responses (404, 500, etc.), the error page HTML was silently returned as valid JSONL batch input, leading to confusing JSON parse failures downstream.
Added a status check con

Updates ModelArchConfigConvertorBase to use s

vllm.author: amd-hhashemi

This checkin adjusts wvSplitKrc to use a static reduce buffer that each kernel call cleans back to zero after use. This avoids the need for a .zero_() call, improving perf.
Additionally the header has been adjusted to match torch.linear() and avoid need for reshape() calls.

This PR reports the CG support correctly.

pip install vllm==0.17.0

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Surface exceptions from non-blocking execute_model in UniProcExecutor to avoid DP deadlocks
vllm.author: fangyuchu
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Fixes issue #35193 by preventing distributed-parallel (DP) hangs. Exceptions raised during async model execution are now surfaced immediately instead of being silently stuck in a Future.
Changes in vllm/v1/executor/uniproc_executor.py when non_block=True:

Calls res.exception(timeout=0) to c

vllm.title: [DSV3.2][MTP] Optimize Indexer MTP handling
vllm.author: benchislett
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Usage of repeat_interleave in MLA indexer MTP batch expansion logic causes gpu/cpu synchronization which breaks async scheduling, causing massive performance degredation. When the requests in the batch have uniform query length (common case for speculative decoding) the shapes are consistent

vllm.title: [ci] Bound nvidia-cudnn-frontend version
vllm.author: khluu
vllm.bodyExcerpt: nvidia-cudnn-frontend seems to only look for CUDA 13 shared object files and it breaks for CUDA 12.9 environment in CI.

vllm.title: Add tuned H100 MoE configs for LFM2 8B and 24B
vllm.author: tianshu-Michael-yu
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Add tuned fused MoE kernel config files for LiquidAI LFM2 MoE models on NVIDIA H100:

E=32, N=1792 (LFM2-8B-A1B)
E=64, N=1536 (LFM2-24B-A2B)

These are added under vllm/model_executor/layers/fused_moe/configs/ and are picked up by vLLM's default config lookup path.

vllm.title: [Model] Add support for moonshotai/Kimi-Audio-7B-Instruct
vllm.author: tunglinwood
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds support for the Kimi-Audio-7B-Instruct model from Moonshot AI, which is a state-of-the-art speech-to-text model combining Whisper encoder with Qwen2 LLM.
Purpose

Add support for moonshotai/Kimi-Audio-7B-Instruct ASR model
Implement KimiAudioForConditionalGeneration with Whisper encoder

vllm.title: [Perf] Optimize scheduler overhead for PD disaggregation, around 5% E2E perf improvement
vllm.author: yewentao256
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Reduce scheduler overhead for async remote KV loads in P/D disaggregation.
When remote KV latency is high, repeatedly pop/prepend-skipping blocked requests in the main waiting queue adds avoidable scheduler CPU cost.
This change makes that path event-driven (promote on finished_recving), red

vllm.author: elvischenv
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
#26680 replaced torch.zeros with torch.empty when initializing attn output.
This PR apply the change to attn+quant fusion.

vllm.title: feat(spec_decode): fuse EAGLE step slot mapping and metadata updates
vllm.author: sladyn98
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Reduce kernel launch overhead during EAGLE autoregressive drafting by fusing the slot mapping and metadata updates between steps into a single Triton kernel.

Implement kernel fusion for slot mapping and metadata updates between EAGLE autoregressive drafting steps to reduce kernel launch over
